name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read

concurrency:
  group: ci-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: ${{ github.event_name == 'pull_request' }}

jobs:
  changes:
    name: Detect changes
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      pull-requests: read
    outputs:
      mac: ${{ github.event_name == 'push' || steps.filter.outputs.mac }}
      core: ${{ github.event_name == 'push' || steps.filter.outputs.core }}
      has-cargo: ${{ steps.cargo-check.outputs.exists }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v4
      - uses: dorny/paths-filter@de90cc6fb38fc0963ad72b210f1f284cd68cea36 # v3
        id: filter
        with:
          filters: |
            mac:
              - 'mac/**'
            core:
              - 'core/**'
      - name: Check for core/Cargo.toml
        id: cargo-check
        run: |
          if [ -f core/Cargo.toml ]; then
            echo "exists=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          else
            echo "exists=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          fi

  swift-lint:
    name: Swift Lint
    needs: changes
    if: needs.changes.outputs.mac == 'true'
    runs-on: macos-26
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v4

      - name: Install SwiftLint
        run: |
          SWIFTLINT_VERSION=0.58.0
          curl -sL "https://github.com/realm/SwiftLint/releases/download/${SWIFTLINT_VERSION}/portable_swiftlint.zip" -o swiftlint.zip
          unzip -q swiftlint.zip -d swiftlint
          echo "$PWD/swiftlint" >> "$GITHUB_PATH"

      - name: Install SwiftFormat
        run: |
          SWIFTFORMAT_VERSION=0.55.3
          curl -sL "https://github.com/nicklockwood/SwiftFormat/releases/download/${SWIFTFORMAT_VERSION}/swiftformat.zip" -o swiftformat.zip
          unzip -q swiftformat.zip
          chmod +x swiftformat
          echo "$PWD" >> "$GITHUB_PATH"

      - name: SwiftLint
        run: swiftlint lint --strict --config mac/.swiftlint.yml mac/PabloCompanion/

      - name: SwiftFormat
        run: swiftformat --lint --config mac/.swiftformat mac/PabloCompanion/

  swift-build:
    name: Swift Build
    needs: changes
    if: needs.changes.outputs.mac == 'true' || github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch'
    runs-on: macos-26
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v4

      - name: Build
        run: |
          xcodebuild -project mac/PabloCompanion.xcodeproj \
            -scheme PabloCompanion \
            -destination 'platform=macOS' \
            CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY="" \
            CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO \
            CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO \
            build | xcpretty

  rust-lint:
    name: Rust Lint
    needs: changes
    if: needs.changes.outputs.core == 'true' && needs.changes.outputs.has-cargo == 'true'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v4

      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
        with:
          components: clippy, rustfmt

      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@779680da715d629ac1d338a641029a2f4372abb5 # v2

      - name: Check formatting
        working-directory: core
        run: cargo fmt --all --check

      - name: Clippy
        working-directory: core
        run: cargo clippy -- -D warnings -W clippy::undocumented_unsafe_blocks

  rust-test:
    name: Rust Test
    needs: changes
    if: needs.changes.outputs.core == 'true' && needs.changes.outputs.has-cargo == 'true'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v4

      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable

      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@779680da715d629ac1d338a641029a2f4372abb5 # v2

      - name: Test
        working-directory: core
        run: cargo test

  dependency-review:
    name: Dependency Review
    if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      pull-requests: write
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v4
      - uses: actions/dependency-review-action@05fe4576374b728f0c523d6a13d64c25081e0803 # v4
        with:
          fail-on-severity: high
          deny-licenses: GPL-2.0, GPL-3.0, AGPL-3.0

name: CodeQL

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]
  schedule:
    - cron: "0 8 * * 3" # Wednesday 8AM UTC
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read
  security-events: write

jobs:
  changes:
    name: Detect Swift changes
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      pull-requests: read
    outputs:
      # Always run on push/schedule; on PRs only run if Swift files changed
      swift: ${{ github.event_name != 'pull_request' || steps.filter.outputs.swift == 'true' }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v4
      - uses: dorny/paths-filter@de90cc6fb38fc0963ad72b210f1f284cd68cea36 # v3
        id: filter
        if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'
        with:
          filters: |
            swift:
              - 'mac/**'

  analyze-swift:
    name: CodeQL (swift)
    needs: changes
    if: needs.changes.outputs.swift == 'true'
    runs-on: macos-26
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v4

      - name: Initialize CodeQL
        uses: github/codeql-action/init@89a39a4e59826350b863aa6b6252a07ad50cf83e # v4
        with:
          languages: swift
          queries: security-extended

      - name: Build
        run: |
          xcodebuild -project mac/PabloCompanion.xcodeproj \
            -scheme PabloCompanion \
            -destination 'platform=macOS' \
            CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY="" \
            CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO \
            CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO \
            build

      - name: Perform CodeQL Analysis
        uses: github/codeql-action/analyze@89a39a4e59826350b863aa6b6252a07ad50cf83e # v4
        with:
          category: /language:swift

# Pablo Companion Memory

## Project Overview
macOS (+ future Windows) companion app for therapists. Monorepo: Rust core (`pablo-core` / UniFFI) + SwiftUI mac app.

## Key Files
- `mac/PabloCompanion/` — all Swift source (Models/, ViewModels/, Views/, Services/)
- `mac/.swiftlint.yml` + `mac/.swiftformat` — linting config (strict, Swift 6)
- `.github/workflows/codeql.yml` + `ci.yml` — CI pipelines
- `Makefile` — `make check` runs lint + build + tests

## Linting Setup
- SwiftLint + SwiftFormat installed via Homebrew
- Run: `swiftlint lint --strict --config mac/.swiftlint.yml mac/PabloCompanion/`
- Run: `swiftformat --config mac/.swiftformat mac/PabloCompanion/`
- SwiftFormat auto-fixes most formatting; SwiftLint catches structural issues
- SourceKit "Cannot find type in scope" errors during active editing are transient — verify with swiftlint, not SourceKit diagnostics

## Known Bugs Fixed
- `TokenRefresher.swift:51` — refresh token was not URL-encoded; Firebase tokens with `=`/`&`/`+` would silently truncate. Fixed with `URLComponents.percentEncodedQuery`.

## Unit Test Plan (approved, not yet implemented)
See `memory/test-plan.md` for full details.

**~35-42 test cases, 4 test files, Swift Testing framework**

3 production code changes required first:
1. Extract `JWTDecoder` struct from `AuthViewModel` (~20 lines)
2. Add `KeychainStorable` protocol + in-memory fake (~30 lines) — real Keychain not accessible in test runner
3. Extract `classifyRefreshError()` pure function from `TokenRefresher` (~10 lines)

## CodeQL / CI Performance Fix (approved, not yet applied)
See `memory/codeql-fix.md` for full YAML.

Root cause: AudioCaptureKit pinned to `branch = main` (not semver tag) + no SPM caching.
Fix: `-clonedSourcePackagesDirPath mac/SourcePackages` + `actions/cache` on `Package.resolved` hash + `-disableAutomaticPackageResolution` on build step. Apply to both `codeql.yml` and `ci.yml`.

Bonus: Pin AudioCaptureKit to a semver tag to eliminate network check on cache hits.

## UniFFI Testing Strategy (future)
When `pablo-core` is integrated, UniFFI auto-generates `PabloCoreProtocol` in Swift — ViewModels can be tested against a `MockPabloCore` with zero extra abstraction. Testing layers: Rust unit tests → Swift ViewModel tests against mock protocol → integration smoke tests in CI.

## AudioCaptureKit
Remote SPM package (`https://github.com/lll-solutions/AudioCaptureKit.git`), branch-pinned to `main`. Transitive deps: `swift-asn1`, `swift-crypto`. Used in: `RecordingViewModel`, `DemoEncryptor`, `SettingsView`.

The failure is likely because someone committed unformatted code, or the CI version of SwiftFormat produces different output than what's running locally. The best approach is keeping the gate in CI as a safeguard while ensuring developers know to run it before committing — either through documentation, a pre-commit hook, or configuring Xcode to format on save.

For the SPM caching issue, I need to modify the build configuration to preserve downloaded packages between runs and cache them based on the `Package.resolved` file, then disable automatic package resolution during builds when the cache is available. name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read

concurrency:
  group: ci-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: ${{ github.event_name == 'pull_request' }}

jobs:
  changes:
    name: Detect changes
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      pull-requests: read
    outputs:
      mac: ${{ github.event_name == 'push' || steps.filter.outputs.mac }}
      core: ${{ github.event_name == 'push' || steps.filter.outputs.core }}
      has-cargo: ${{ steps.cargo-check.outputs.exists }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v4
      - uses: dorny/paths-filter@de90cc6fb38fc0963ad72b210f1f284cd68cea36 # v3
        id: filter
        with:
          filters: |
            mac:
              - 'mac/**'
            core:
              - 'core/**'
      - name: Check for core/Cargo.toml
        id: cargo-check
        run: |
          if [ -f core/Cargo.toml ]; then
            echo "exists=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          else
            echo "exists=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          fi

  swift-lint:
    name: Swift Lint
    needs: changes
    if: needs.changes.outputs.mac == 'true'
    runs-on: macos-26
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v4

      - name: Install SwiftLint
        run: |
          SWIFTLINT_VERSION=0.58.0
          curl -sL "https://github.com/realm/SwiftLint/releases/download/${SWIFTLINT_VERSION}/portable_swiftlint.zip" -o swiftlint.zip
          unzip -q swiftlint.zip -d swiftlint
          echo "$PWD/swiftlint" >> "$GITHUB_PATH"

      - name: Install SwiftFormat
        run: |
          SWIFTFORMAT_VERSION=0.55.3
          curl -sL "https://github.com/nicklockwood/SwiftFormat/releases/download/${SWIFTFORMAT_VERSION}/swiftformat.zip" -o swiftformat.zip
          unzip -q swiftformat.zip
          chmod +x swiftformat
          echo "$PWD" >> "$GITHUB_PATH"

      - name: SwiftLint
        run: swiftlint lint --strict --config mac/.swiftlint.yml mac/PabloCompanion/

      - name: SwiftFormat
        run: swiftformat --lint --config mac/.swiftformat mac/PabloCompanion/

  swift-build:
    name: Swift Build
    needs: changes
    if: needs.changes.outputs.mac == 'true' || github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch'
    runs-on: macos-26
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v4

      - name: Build
        run: |
          xcodebuild -project mac/PabloCompanion.xcodeproj \
            -scheme PabloCompanion \
            -destination 'platform=macOS' \
            CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY="" \
            CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO \
            CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO \
            build | xcpretty

  rust-lint:
    name: Rust Lint
    needs: changes
    if: needs.changes.outputs.core == 'true' && needs.changes.outputs.has-cargo == 'true'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v4

      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
        with:
          components: clippy, rustfmt

      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@779680da715d629ac1d338a641029a2f4372abb5 # v2

      - name: Check formatting
        working-directory: core
        run: cargo fmt --all --check

      - name: Clippy
        working-directory: core
        run: cargo clippy -- -D warnings -W clippy::undocumented_unsafe_blocks

  rust-test:
    name: Rust Test
    needs: changes
    if: needs.changes.outputs.core == 'true' && needs.changes.outputs.has-cargo == 'true'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v4

      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable

      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@779680da715d629ac1d338a641029a2f4372abb5 # v2

      - name: Test
        working-directory: core
        run: cargo test

  dependency-review:
    name: Dependency Review
    if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      pull-requests: write
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v4
      - uses: actions/dependency-review-action@05fe4576374b728f0c523d6a13d64c25081e0803 # v4
        with:
          fail-on-severity: high
          deny-licenses: GPL-2.0, GPL-3.0, AGPL-3.0

name: CodeQL

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]
  schedule:
    - cron: "0 8 * * 3" # Wednesday 8AM UTC
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read
  security-events: write

jobs:
  changes:
    name: Detect Swift changes
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      pull-requests: read
    outputs:
      # Always run on push/schedule; on PRs only run if Swift files changed
      swift: ${{ github.event_name != 'pull_request' || steps.filter.outputs.swift == 'true' }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v4
      - uses: dorny/paths-filter@de90cc6fb38fc0963ad72b210f1f284cd68cea36 # v3
        id: filter
        if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'
        with:
          filters: |
            swift:
              - 'mac/**'

  analyze-swift:
    name: CodeQL (swift)
    needs: changes
    if: needs.changes.outputs.swift == 'true'
    runs-on: macos-26
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v4

      - name: Initialize CodeQL
        uses: github/codeql-action/init@89a39a4e59826350b863aa6b6252a07ad50cf83e # v4
        with:
          languages: swift
          queries: security-extended

      - name: Build
        run: |
          xcodebuild -project mac/PabloCompanion.xcodeproj \
            -scheme PabloCompanion \
            -destination 'platform=macOS' \
            CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY="" \
            CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO \
            CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO \
            build

      - name: Perform CodeQL Analysis
        uses: github/codeql-action/analyze@89a39a4e59826350b863aa6b6252a07ad50cf83e # v4
        with:
          category: /language:swift

swift-lint:
    name: Swift Lint
    needs: changes
    if: needs.changes.outputs.mac == 'true'
    runs-on: macos-26
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v4

      - name: Install SwiftLint
        run: |
          SWIFTLINT_VERSION=0.63.2
          curl -sL "https://github.com/realm/SwiftLint/releases/download/${SWIFTLINT_VERSION}/portable_swiftlint.zip" -o swiftlint.zip
          unzip -q swiftlint.zip -d swiftlint
          echo "$PWD/swiftlint" >> "$GITHUB_PATH"

      - name: Install SwiftFormat
        run: |
          SWIFTFORMAT_VERSION=0.59.1
          curl -sL "https://github.com/nicklockwood/SwiftFormat/releases/download/${SWIFTFORMAT_VERSION}/swiftformat.zip" -o swiftformat.zip
          unzip -q swiftformat.zip
          chmod +x swiftformat
          echo "$PWD" >> "$GITHUB_PATH"

      - name: SwiftLint
        run: swiftlint lint --strict --config mac/.swiftlint.yml mac/PabloCompanion/

      - name: SwiftFormat
        run: swiftformat --lint --config mac/.swiftformat mac/PabloCompanion/

  swift-build:
    name: Swift Build
    needs: changes
    if: needs.changes.outputs.mac == 'true' || github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch'
    runs-on: macos-26
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v4

      - name: Cache SPM dependencies
        id: spm-cache
        uses: actions/cache@6849a6489940f00c2f30c0fb92c6274307ccb58a # v4
        with:
          path: mac/SourcePackages
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-spm-${{ hashFiles('mac/PabloCompanion.xcodeproj/project.xcworkspace/xcshareddata/swiftpm/Package.resolved') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-spm-

      - name: Build
        run: |
          DISABLE_PKGS=${{ steps.spm-cache.outputs.cache-hit == 'true' && '-disableAutomaticPackageResolution' || '' }}
          xcodebuild -project mac/PabloCompanion.xcodeproj \
            -scheme PabloCompanion \
            -destination 'platform=macOS' \
            -clonedSourcePackagesDirPath mac/SourcePackages \
            $DISABLE_PKGS \
            CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY="" \

All clean. Here's what was done and why:

---

**Root cause:** CI was pinned to old tool versions (SwiftLint 0.58.0, SwiftFormat 0.55.3) while local Homebrew had 0.63.2 / 0.59.1. The wrapping behavior in `SettingsView.swift:57-79` changed between SwiftFormat 0.55 and 0.59 — the old version flagged those lines, the new one doesn't.

**Fixes applied:**

| Change | File |
|--------|------|
| SwiftLint 0.58.0 → 0.63.2 | `ci.yml` |
| SwiftFormat 0.55.3 → 0.59.1 | `ci.yml` |
| SPM cache (`mac/SourcePackages`, keyed on `Package.resolved`) | `ci.yml`, `codeql.yml` |
| `-clonedSourcePackagesDirPath` + `-disableAutomaticPackageResolution` on cache hit | both |

**On the SwiftFormat-in-CI philosophy:** It's correct to have it in CI as an enforcement gate (catches "forgot to run it locally" before merge). The workflow is: devs run `swiftformat` locally to auto-fix, then `make check` to verify, then push. CI uses `--lint` to block if they didn't. As long as CI versions match local, no false failures.

# SwiftLint Configuration — Pablo Companion
# Enforces modern Swift 6 patterns, strict concurrency, and HIPAA-safe coding practices.

excluded:
  - .build
  - Pods
  - "**/*.generated.swift"

opt_in_rules:
  # Swift 6 / Modern Swift
  - closure_body_length
  - collection_alignment
  - contains_over_filter_count
  - contains_over_first_not_nil
  - contains_over_range_nil_comparison
  - convenience_type
  - discouraged_optional_boolean
  - empty_collection_literal
  - empty_count
  - empty_string
  - enum_case_associated_values_count
  - explicit_init
  - fatal_error_message
  - file_name_no_space
  - first_where
  - flatmap_over_map_reduce
  - identical_operands
  - implicit_return
  - joined_default_parameter
  - last_where
  - legacy_multiple
  - literal_expression_end_indentation
  - lower_acl_than_parent
  - modifier_order
  - nimble_operator
  - operator_usage_whitespace
  - overridden_super_call
  - override_in_extension
  - pattern_matching_keywords
  - prefer_self_in_static_references
  - prefer_self_type_over_type_of_self
  - prefer_zero_over_explicit_init
  - private_action
  - private_outlet
  - prohibited_super_call
  - raw_value_for_camel_cased_codable_enum
  - reduce_into
  - redundant_nil_coalescing
  - redundant_type_annotation
  - return_value_from_void_function
  - shorthand_optional_binding
  - sorted_first_last
  - static_operator
  - toggle_bool
  - unavailable_function
  - unneeded_parentheses_in_closure_argument
  - unowned_variable_capture
  - vertical_parameter_alignment_on_call
  - yoda_condition

  # Concurrency
  - strict_fileprivate

  # Imports
  - unused_import

  # Closures
  - unused_closure_parameter

disabled_rules:
  # Conflicts with SwiftUI trailing closure patterns
  - multiple_closures_with_trailing_closure
  # Conflicts with SwiftFormat --commas always
  - trailing_comma

# --- Severity Thresholds ---

line_length:
  warning: 120
  error: 200

file_length:
  warning: 400
  error: 600

function_body_length:
  warning: 40
  error: 80

cyclomatic_complexity:
  warning: 10
  error: 20

type_body_length:
  warning: 300
  error: 500

type_name:
  min_length: 3
  max_length: 50

identifier_name:
  min_length: 2
  max_length: 50
  excluded:
    - id
    - i
    - x
    - y

# --- Error-Level Rules (Critical for Audio/Security Code) ---

force_unwrapping: error
force_cast: error
force_try: error

trailing_whitespace:
  ignores_empty_lines: true

trailing_newline: warning

# --- Custom Rules ---

custom_rules:
  no_print_statements:
    name: "No print() Statements"
    regex: "\\bprint\\s*\\("
    message: "Use os.log or Logger instead of print() for HIPAA compliance. No PHI must leak to console."
    severity: error
    match_kinds:
      - identifier
    excluded: ".*Tests.*\\.swift"

# Pablo Companion Memory

## Project Overview
macOS (+ future Windows) companion app for therapists. Monorepo: Rust core (`pablo-core` / UniFFI) + SwiftUI mac app.

## Key Files
- `mac/PabloCompanion/` — all Swift source (Models/, ViewModels/, Views/, Services/)
- `mac/.swiftlint.yml` + `mac/.swiftformat` — linting config (strict, Swift 6)
- `.github/workflows/codeql.yml` + `ci.yml` — CI pipelines
- `Makefile` — `make check` runs lint + build + tests

## Linting Setup
- SwiftLint + SwiftFormat installed via Homebrew
- Run: `swiftlint lint --strict --config mac/.swiftlint.yml mac/PabloCompanion/`
- Run: `swiftformat --config mac/.swiftformat mac/PabloCompanion/`
- SwiftFormat auto-fixes most formatting; SwiftLint catches structural issues
- SourceKit "Cannot find type in scope" errors during active editing are transient — verify with swiftlint, not SourceKit diagnostics

## Known Bugs Fixed
- `TokenRefresher.swift:51` — refresh token was not URL-encoded; Firebase tokens with `=`/`&`/`+` would silently truncate. Fixed with `URLComponents.percentEncodedQuery`.

## Unit Test Plan (approved, not yet implemented)
See `memory/test-plan.md` for full details.

**~35-42 test cases, 4 test files, Swift Testing framework**

3 production code changes required first:
1. Extract `JWTDecoder` struct from `AuthViewModel` (~20 lines)
2. Add `KeychainStorable` protocol + in-memory fake (~30 lines) — real Keychain not accessible in test runner
3. Extract `classifyRefreshError()` pure function from `TokenRefresher` (~10 lines)

## CI Tool Versions (keep in sync with local Homebrew installs)
- SwiftLint: 0.63.2 (latest as of 2026-02)
- SwiftFormat: 0.59.1 (latest as of 2026-02)

## SPM Caching (applied to ci.yml + codeql.yml)
- `actions/cache` on `Package.resolved` hash, path `mac/SourcePackages`
- Build uses `-clonedSourcePackagesDirPath mac/SourcePackages`
- Cache hit → passes `-disableAutomaticPackageResolution` (skips branch-pin network check for AudioCaptureKit)
- AudioCaptureKit still branch-pinned to `main` — pinning to a semver tag would fully eliminate the network check even without the flag

## UniFFI Testing Strategy (future)
When `pablo-core` is integrated, UniFFI auto-generates `PabloCoreProtocol` in Swift — ViewModels can be tested against a `MockPabloCore` with zero extra abstraction. Testing layers: Rust unit tests → Swift ViewModel tests against mock protocol → integration smoke tests in CI.

The transient "Cannot find type in scope" errors aren't a SourceKit version problem. They're just SourceKit's index being momentarily stale while Claude Code is rapidly writing/editing files. SourceKit indexes on demand — it hasn't caught up yet. A few seconds after edits settle, they disappear.
